# About This Document {#about-this-document}

The Professional Services TRD are documents designed to be best practices questionnaire guides for experienced engineers and consultants on what requirements need to be met before deploying Palo Alto Networks technologies in a consistent and effective manner. These documents assume that the reader is already familiar with Palo Alto Networks technology, and they are meant to serve as a high-level checklist of how to deploy certain projects.

These documents do not replace other technical documentation published by Palo Alto Networks on their products and features. For more information about anything referenced in this document, see the technical documentation found at:

[https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/documentation](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/documentation)

Send your comments about this document to [pso-secops-leaders@paloaltonetworks.com](mailto:pso-secops-leaders@paloaltonetworks.com). Your feedback is important to us.

© 2021 Palo Alto Networks, Inc. Palo Alto Networks is a registered trademark of Palo Alto Networks. A list of our trademarks can be found at http://www.paloaltonetworks.com/company/trademarks.html. All other marks mentioned herein may be trademarks of their respective companies.

# Project Objectives {#project-objectives}

The objective of this project is to provide the Customer with reusable Terraform modules to move from manual provisioning to automated provisioning or an Infrastructure as Code (IaC) workflow.

#

# Environment Overview {#environment-overview}

## **General Housekeeping** {#general-housekeeping}

Use the following questions to gather information regarding any generalized aspects of the customer’s requirements or goals and record the information in the table. If during the technical review call(s) the consultant chooses to ask additional questions regarding a specific topic please add a row to the table and record the information.

| General | Customer Input |
| ----- | ----- |
| List which teams will be involved in creating or managing the infrastructure being deployed. | *DevOps, Automation, Cloud, Security, Network teams, key individuals*  |
| Describe the existing policies/workflows for change management.  | *Jenkins, BridgeCrew, etc.* |
| How will PANW Terraform deployments  be integrated into the existing policies or workflows?  Will any pieces of the existing deployment pipeline be removed or replaced? |  |
| Are there any auditing and compliance requirements that we need to integrate with? | *Auditors can look at Git and see who made any changes, when and why, and how that impacted the running system deployments* |
| General onboarding process/access requirements. | *Describe the process to access elements of the pipeline. (VCS, dashboards, etc.)* |

## **Organizational Environment** {#organizational-environment}

Use the following questions to gather information about the customer’s layout of environments and the usage thereof. If, during the technical review call(s), the consultant chooses to ask additional questions regarding a specific topic please add a row to the table and record the information.

| Environments | Customer Input |
| ----- | ----- |
| Is there environment separation for development, test/staging and production? List and briefly describe these different environments | *Some organizations have dev, test, staging or other environments in addition to the final production environment.* |
| If yes, is there a multi-account setup in the public cloud to represent different environments? | *yes/no* |
| Are all services replicated in the pre-prod environments? | *yes/no* |
| WIll service accounts be provided for each public cloud environment identified above for automation? | *yes/no* |

#

# Infrastructure as Code

Use the following questions to gather information about the customer’s understanding and usage of IaC orchestration tooling such as Terraform for cloud infrastructure provisioning and record the information in the table. If, during the technical review call(s), the consultant chooses to ask additional questions regarding a specific topic please add a row to the table and record the information.

Notes:

1. Remind the customer to take great care to deactivate licenses/deregister all firewalls before performing a “terraform destroy” command, unless Panorama delicensing plugin is used.

| IaC | Customer Input |
| ----- | ----- |
| Is there any existing Terraform automation used for deploying other cloud infrastructure? If yes, describe the current setup |   |
| If Terraform is in use today, is it Terraform Enterprise or Terraform Cloud or Terraform open source? |  |
| Where will the Terraform modules be stored? | Consume via Terraform registry (public/private) via Git source stored local to the Root module |
| Provide detail around Terraform version requirements. | *Use of the latest version of Terraform is encouraged to the extent possible.* |
| How will the  Terraform state be stored and provided to the pipeline with access for configurations? | *AWS S3, Azure Blob Storage, Google Cloud Storage, OCI Object Storage or Terraform Cloud/Enterprise* |
| Describe Strategy for root module and state separation or workspaces. | *Separate root module for base infrastructure, VM-Series components, and ALB app definitions.* |
| List and briefly describe any existing GitHub actions or other pipeline automation |  |
| Explain your pull request approval/rejection workflow. | *Pull requests get rejected/approved based on peer code reviews.  Pull requests may be rejected for security reasons by automated scans per commit.*  |
| Do you have any working examples where you retrieve variables needed in Terraform that need to be pulled from a secret store?  | Example: AWS Secret Manager Hashicorp Vault Azure Key Vault CyberArk |

# Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery {#continuous-integration/continuous-delivery}

Use the following questions to gather information about the current version control system (VCS) in place and record the information in the table. If during the technical review call(s) the consultant chooses to ask additional questions regarding a specific topic please add a row to the table and record the information.

| Version Control | Customer Input |
| ----- | ----- |
| What is the preferred version control system?  | *Examples: GitHub GitHub Enterprise GitLab Azure DevOps BitBucket AWS Code Commit* |
| Ask for a working pipeline confguration file. |  |
| Are the engineers/developers familiar with Git and standard Git workflows? | *yes/no* |
| Are the engineers/developers familiar with using Git repositories? Is there experience using pull requests to collaborate with other engineers in the same repository? | *yes/no* |
| Is there an existing IAM solution integrated with the VCS? | *yes/no* |
| If yes, is IAM set up to control access to repositories, branches? Please explain the current setup in detail |  *(usage of groups, code owners files)* |
| What code branching strategy in place? If so, describe that here. | *Gitflow, GitHub flow, Gitlab flow, other* |
| What strategy is used for tagging branches, releases, etc. ? |  |

# Proposed Design {#proposed-design}

Short description about the proposed CI/CD design

If there is no existing pipeline setup we will implement a simple CLI-driven run workflow which uses Terraform's standard CLI tools to execute runs locally on a workstation.
